name: blob-solutions/woocommerce-vcr-am-strauss-bin
description: Isolated composer-bin context for brianhenryie/strauss. Strauss's transitive deps (voku/simple-cache → psr/simple-cache 1|2) conflict with Pest 4's mutate plugin (psr/simple-cache 3) when installed in the main require-dev. Keeping Strauss here lets us scope production deps for WP.org distribution without dragging that conflict into the main composer environment.
